highlights.description: Registry integration with omnivoice-core for automatic OpenAI Realtime provider discovery
Type-safe registry options for provider-specific configuration

added.description: [realtime] Registry integration with omnivoice-core via side-effect imports
[realtime] Type-safe registry options (`WithRegistryTools`, `WithRegistryTurnDetection`, `WithRegistryModalities`)
[realtime] Registry options for audio format (`WithRegistryInputAudioFormat`, `WithRegistryOutputAudioFormat`)
[realtime] Registry options for generation parameters (`WithRegistryTemperature`, `WithRegistryMaxResponseOutputTokens`)
[realtime] Enhanced factory with typed extension handling
[realtime] `Provider()` method on wrapper for accessing underlying OpenAI realtime provider

highlights.description: Added OpenAI Realtime API for native voice-to-voice with ~100ms latency

added.description: OpenAI Realtime API WebSocket client for GPT-4o-realtime
RealtimeProvider with ProcessAudioStream for voice-to-voice processing
All client/server event types per OpenAI Realtime API specification
Configuration options: voice, instructions, VAD, tools, temperature
Function calling support with OnFunctionCall callback
PCM16 24kHz mono audio format (native for LiveKit integration)

documentation.description: Realtime API provider guide with quick start and integration examples
README updated with OmniVoice Realtime usage example

tests.description: Unit tests for client configuration, event parsing, and provider

highlights.description: Module renamed from omnivoice-openai to omni-openai
Added OmniLLM provider adapter for chat completions

breaking.description: Module path changed from github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-openai to github.com/plexusone/omni-openai

added.description: OmniLLM provider implementing core.Provider interface with streaming, tool calling, vision, and JSON mode support
Auto-registration with omnillm-core registry at thick provider priority
MkDocs documentation site with getting started guide, provider docs, and API reference
Conformance tests using `providertest` framework for OmniLLM provider
OpenAI client with `Transcribe`, `TranscribeFile`, `Synthesize`, `SynthesizeStream` methods
OmniVoice STT provider implementing `stt.Provider` interface
OmniVoice TTS provider implementing `tts.Provider` interface
Unit tests for STT and TTS providers

build.description: Add CI workflows, gitignore, and license
